---
title: ""
output: html_document
date: ''
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Our lab mainly studies the epigenetic mechanisms in the human brain and related diseases.

## Decipher the functions of human brain related disease-associated common genetic variants

We will utilize Hi-C/HiChIP to link the human brain related disease-associated common genetic variants to their cognate genes.

## study the functions of chromatin loops across distinct TADs

We will uncover the functions of chromatin loops across different TADs.

## predict the Silencers and their functions

We will use deep learning to predict Silencers across different tissues and cell types, and use CRISPR-dCas9/MRRIA to reveal the functions of these Silencers.
